match_reasons: Documents async Dexie label resolution with Promise.all + ignore unmount guard
Documents the recentHitKeys useMemo pattern for stable dependency keys
findings.key_insight: RecentHit schema stores only {type, id, openedAt} intentionally. Labels must be resolved from Dexie at render time via a useEffect with Promise.all and an ignore unmount flag. The stable key useMemo(recentHitKeys) compares serialized type:id tuples to prevent re-fetching on unrelated re-renders.

match_reasons: Documents useMemo render-phase write pattern (not for memoization)
Documents aria-live separate settle delay (400ms vs 150ms search debounce)
Documents Home/End synthetic mousemove dispatch for cmdk keyboard nav
findings.key_insight: Seven load-bearing invariants in the search index layer. Most critical for this work: (1) shouldFilter={false} on Command is non-negotiable — removing it causes cmdk double-filtering; (2) useMemo is used for render-phase ref assignment, not memoization — switching to useEffect introduces stale-ref races; (3) Promise.allSettled results must use flatMap with status guards, never array destructure.

Scope prefix detection is position-0 only (leading space is escape hatch). Backspace on empty search-within-scope clears scope entirely. initialScope is one-shot — parent must reset to null in onOpenChange. shouldFilter={false} is load-bearing and must not be removed.

match_reasons: Same UUID-leakage pattern resolved with Dexie enrichment
Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation in enrichment lookups
findings.key_insight: UUID leakage fix pattern is identical — enrich sparse IDs by resolving from Dexie at render time using Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation. CSS overflow fix requires min-w-0 on flex items containing user-generated text, plus both break-words and overflow-wrap:anywhere for robust word breaking. ScrollArea auto-scroll must target the internal [data-slot='scroll-area-viewport'] element, not the root wrapper.

residual_risks.risk: IU-1 normalizeFilename may produce unexpected results for non-English filenames or filenames without clear separators (e.g., lesson1final.mp4 -> Lesson1Final). Output is still more readable than UUID.
residual_risks.mitigation: Cover edge cases in unit tests: empty string, no separators, mixed separators, already-formatted strings.

residual_risks.risk: IU-3 max-h increase on CommandList affects 5 other consumers (SettingsSearch, ProviderModelPicker, etc.). Regression possible if those consumers relied on the 300px clamp.
residual_risks.mitigation: Verify all 5 consumers render correctly with the new max-h after change.

residual_risks.risk: IU-5 shorter placeholder reduces discoverability of notes/highlights search. Screen reader users still get full list from CommandDialog description.
residual_risks.mitigation: Acceptable trade-off per plan, but verify no accessibility complaints in QA.

testing_gaps.gap: No tests for empty Pages section gating (IU-2)
testing_gaps.detail: The plan says 'no new tests needed, existing snapshot covers it', but a dedicated test for the empty-section edge case would prevent regression.

testing_gaps.gap: No visual regression test for scrollbar suppression (IU-3)
testing_gaps.detail: The scrollbar-always-visible issue is a visual UX concern. Current test suite does not capture visual state of CommandList scrollbar.

testing_gaps.gap: No test for scope chip clear button spacing (IU-4)
testing_gaps.detail: Spacing change is purely visual. Current test suite cannot validate padding/visual spacing changes.

learnings.relevance: The normalizeFilename utility being created in IU-1 should be used in the existing useEffect-based label resolution at line 826 of SearchCommandPalette.tsx, which already follows the pattern documented in this solution (useEffect + Promise.all + ignore unmount guard + stable key from useMemo).
IU-3 modifies CommandList's max-h in command.tsx. Must not touch shouldFilter={false} on the parent Command component — that invariant is load-bearing for the entire search palette.
If any work touches the index-sync layer (unifiedSearch.ts), must preserve the useMemo render-phase write pattern — switching to useEffect would introduce stale ref races.
IU-4 and IU-5 modify the scope chip and placeholder areas. Must preserve the invariant that backspace on empty query clears scope, and that initialScope is one-shot (reset in onOpenChange).
The normalizeFilename fix (IU-1) follows the same UUID-leakage prevention pattern documented here: always resolve display labels from canonical data store, never render raw database keys.
If the normalizeFilename utility or label resolution uses Promise.allSettled, must flatMap with status === 'fulfilled' guard — never array destructure, which silently drops errors.
